title: JWT Algorithm Confusion (RS256 ↔ HS256)
description: TokenStop's verifier accepts both RS256 and HS256 with the same key parameter. When you submit alg=HS256, the public PEM becomes the HMAC secret. Forge an admin token.

hints.text: Fetch /public-key. Those exact PEM bytes (including the BEGIN/END lines and trailing newline) are the HMAC secret for HS256.
Header {"alg":"HS256","typ":"JWT"}, payload {"sub":"x","role":"admin"}. base64url-encode both, sign with HMAC-SHA256 using the PEM bytes, send as Bearer.
